name: Narrative Arc And Goal Progress Metrics
description: Propose a validation concept stack for narrative arc and goal progress metrics.
related_rules: All core evaluation paths MUST be deterministic for fixed inputs and configuration in the deterministic writing architecture.
Benchmarks MUST include long-form narrative and multi-turn dialogue fixtures with seeded continuity and memory challenges.
related_validators: Periodically re-calibrate automated evaluators against human rubric benchmarks for both narrative and dialogue.
related_failure_modes: Narrative coherence benchmarks are gamed via checklist inclusion, not genuine plot logic.
